caption: Golden hour wedding in Fort Mill. The light finally cooperated. 📷
Uptown skyline at blue hour. Charlotte never disappoints.
Corporate headshots delivered. Clean light, easy crew.
Brand shoot for a NoDa maker — product + lifestyle set.
Engagement session in Freedom Park. These two were so easy to shoot.
New Porch Light print is up. NoDa rooftops at dusk.
Full gallery from the Pinnacle gala. What a night.
Behind the scenes on a studio portrait day.
Real estate listing shoot for Rosewood. Wide and warm.
Film grab from a rainy NoDa walk. Sometimes the gray is the shot.

Porch Light series shoot at the half-hour before the light comes on.
Pinnacle Events booking with Rachel — two to three events this month.
Editing the wedding gallery with the playlist on, overhead lights dimmed.
Simone's wedding October 17 — I'm the photographer, no pressure.
Brunch with Simone Saturday, infrastructure not optional.
Rosewood Realty headshots, chasing the late payment again.
Friday yoga for the shoulders; the camera strap rides there all week.
Reviewed the spreadsheet on the 1st, the small grim ritual.
Nina gave honest feedback on the Porch Light edit; still not rushing it.
Morocco frames still processing, the Portugal drive barely touched.
Therapy with Dr. Torres Tuesday at 5 — career anxiety and patterns.
Oat milk latte at the NoDa shop, same order every morning.
No-shoot walk around NoDa at six, camera and no plan.
Sony A7 IV, the 35 and the 70-200, packed light for the shoot.
Called Mom twice this week; filtered about 40 percent of the advice.
Terrell fixed the portfolio site again — first call when tech breaks.
Vinyl store browsing, not buying, the quiet before the crowd.
HoneyBook contract out, Stripe invoice sent for the corporate shoot.
Rereading On Photography, Sontag in the warm-bulb light.
Lease decision by October 22, month-to-month on Brevard.
Editorial portrait session — clean white wall and diagonal window light.
Japan next, then Colombia; go deep instead of collecting countries.
Rooftop mini-sessions this weekend, warm evening light.
R&B and neo-soul tagged by editing project, always on.
